meta.question: What views are defined under the TMT-APS-SE veiw package?
meta.finalAnswer:
The TMT-APS-SE view package contains **481 views** organized into **10 top-level categories**:

| Top-Level View Category | Number of Views |
|------------------------|-----------------|
| TMT-APS DDD | 273 |
| TMT-APS Use Cases | 138 |
| TMT ICD: APS to M1CS | 28 |
| TMT-APS Model Information | 19 |
| TMT-APS Requirements Flow-down | 8 |
| Generated ICD: APS to M1CS | 6 |
| TMT-APS Analysis | 4 |
| TMT-APS L3 Requirements | 3 |
| TMT View Editor management | 1 |
| (other) | 1 |

The views are organized under nested packages within TMT-APS-SE, including:
- **TMT-APS DDD** (Domain Decomposition and Interfaces) - the largest category
- **TMT-APS Use Cases** - use case documentation
- **TMT ICD: APS to M1CS** - Interface Control Document between APS and M1CS
- **TMT-APS Model Information** - model metadata
- **TMT-APS Requirements Flow-down** - requirements traceability
- **Generated ICD: APS to M1CS** - auto-generated ICD
- **TMT-APS Analysis** - analysis documentation
- **TMT-APS L3 Requirements** - Level 3 requirements

events.output: I'll help you find the views defined under the TMT-APS-SE view package. Let me start by exploring the model to locate this package and its contents.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS-SE"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the TMT-APS-SE package. Now need to explore its properties to find all views defined under it.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS-SE"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found that TMT-APS-SE has 20 owned elements, 14 packaged elements, and 10 nested packages. Now need to query for all view elements under this package.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS-SE" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_nestedPackage ?nestedPkg .
  ?nestedPkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?view .
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name ?qn WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found many views under TMT-APS-SE by searching for view type with qualified name containing "TMT-APS-SE". Results are truncated, need to get full count and list.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(?view) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE"))
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE::") && !CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%20"))
  BIND(REPLACE(?qn, "TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::09%20Views::TMT-APS-SE::", "") AS ?shortName)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(?shortName, "::") AS ?topLevel)
}
ORDER BY ?topLevel
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?topLevel (COUNT(?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE::"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%20"))
  BIND(REPLACE(?qn, "TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::09%20Views::TMT-APS-SE::", "") AS ?shortName)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(?shortName, "::") AS ?topLevel)
}
GROUP BY ?topLevel
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?topLevel (COUNT(?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "TMT-APS-SE::"))
  BIND(REPLACE(?qn, "TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::09%20Views::TMT-APS-SE::", "") AS ?shortName)
  BIND(IF(STRENDS(?shortName, "::"), SUBSTR(?shortName, 1, STRLEN(?shortName)-2), ?shortName) AS ?noTrailing)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(?noTrailing, "::") AS ?topLevel)
}
GROUP BY ?topLevel
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)
